'''鈭歯g-v-z''' ('''ngavaza''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unappoint|unappoint]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-v-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unappoint|unappoint]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-v-z
|-
! Lemma
| ngavaza
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngavazithi|ngavazithi]] || [[word:ngavaziji|ngavaziji]] || [[word:ngavazishi|ngavazishi]] || [[word:ngavazi|ngavazi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngavazuthuth|ngavazuthuth]] || [[word:ngavazujuj|ngavazujuj]] || [[word:ngavazushush|ngavazushush]] || [[word:ngavaz|ngavaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngavazuthu|ngavazuthu]] || [[word:ngavazuju|ngavazuju]] || [[word:ngavazushu|ngavazushu]] || [[word:ngavazu|ngavazu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngavazufuth|ngavazufuth]] || [[word:ngavazufuj|ngavazufuj]] || [[word:ngavazufush|ngavazufush]] || [[word:ngavazuf|ngavazuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngavazethe|ngavazethe]] || [[word:ngavazeje|ngavazeje]] || [[word:ngavazeshe|ngavazeshe]] || [[word:ngavaze|ngavaze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngavazothoth|ngavazothoth]] || [[word:ngavazojoj|ngavazojoj]] || [[word:ngavazoshosh|ngavazoshosh]] || [[word:ngavaz|ngavaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngavazotho|ngavazotho]] || [[word:ngavazojo|ngavazojo]] || [[word:ngavazosho|ngavazosho]] || [[word:ngavazo|ngavazo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngavazofoth|ngavazofoth]] || [[word:ngavazofoj|ngavazofoj]] || [[word:ngavazofosh|ngavazofosh]] || [[word:ngavazof|ngavazof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngavaz忙th忙|ngavaz忙th忙]] || [[word:ngavaz忙j忙|ngavaz忙j忙]] || [[word:ngavaz忙sh忙|ngavaz忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngavaz忙|ngavaz忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngavazathath|ngavazathath]] || [[word:ngavazajaj|ngavazajaj]] || [[word:ngavazashash|ngavazashash]] || [[word:ngavaz|ngavaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngavazatha|ngavazatha]] || [[word:ngavazaja|ngavazaja]] || [[word:ngavazasha|ngavazasha]] || [[word:ngavaza|ngavaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngavazafath|ngavazafath]] || [[word:ngavazafaj|ngavazafaj]] || [[word:ngavazafash|ngavazafash]] || [[word:ngavazaf|ngavazaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngavazasha|ngavazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongavazasha|gongavazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingavazasha|gokingavazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngavazn眉sha|ngavazn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongavaznkn眉sha|gongavaznkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingavazn眉sha|gokingavazn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngavazsh毛sha|ngavazsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongavaznksh毛sha|gongavaznksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingavazsh毛sha|gokingavazsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngavazrosha|ngavazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongavaznkrosha|gongavaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingavazrosha|gokingavazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngavazmusha|ngavazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongavaznkmusha|gongavaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingavazmusha|gokingavazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngavazsherasha|ngavazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongavaznksherasha|gongavaznksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingavazsherasha|gokingavazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngavazngasha|ngavazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongavaznkngasha|gongavaznkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingavazngasha|gokingavazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngavazyasha|ngavazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongavaznkyasha|gongavaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingavazyasha|gokingavazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngavazyamasha|ngavazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongavaznkyamasha|gongavaznkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingavazyamasha|gokingavazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngavazn眉sh毛sha|ngavazn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongavaznkn眉sh毛sha|gongavaznkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingavazn眉sh毛sha|gokingavazn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngavazn眉rosha|ngavazn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongavaznkn眉rosha|gongavaznkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingavazn眉rosha|gokingavazn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngavazn眉musha|ngavazn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongavaznkn眉musha|gongavaznkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingavazn眉musha|gokingavazn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngavazsh毛n眉sha|ngavazsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongavaznksh毛n眉sha|gongavaznksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingavazsh毛n眉sha|gokingavazsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngavazsh毛rosha|ngavazsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongavaznksh毛rosha|gongavaznksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingavazsh毛rosha|gokingavazsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngavazsh毛musha|ngavazsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongavaznksh毛musha|gongavaznksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingavazsh毛musha|gokingavazsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngavazron眉sha|ngavazron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongavaznkron眉sha|gongavaznkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingavazron眉sha|gokingavazron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngavazrosh毛sha|ngavazrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongavaznkrosh毛sha|gongavaznkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingavazrosh毛sha|gokingavazrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngavazromusha|ngavazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongavaznkromusha|gongavaznkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingavazromusha|gokingavazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngavazmun眉sha|ngavazmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongavaznkmun眉sha|gongavaznkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingavazmun眉sha|gokingavazmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngavazmush毛sha|ngavazmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongavaznkmush毛sha|gongavaznkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingavazmush毛sha|gokingavazmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngavazmurosha|ngavazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongavaznkmurosha|gongavaznkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingavazmurosha|gokingavazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngavaz|ngavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙v忙z|ng忙v忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongavaz|hongavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙v忙z|hong忙v忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongavaz|hohongavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙v忙z|hohong忙v忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngavaz|n眉ngavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙v忙z|n眉ng忙v忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngavaz|n眉n眉ngavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙v忙z|n眉n眉ng忙v忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngavaz|n茂ngavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙v忙z|n茂ng忙v忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngavaz|n茂n茂ngavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙v忙z|n茂n茂ng忙v忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungavaz|lungavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙v忙z|lung忙v忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungavaz|lulungavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙v忙z|lulung忙v忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingavaz|lingavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙v忙z|ling忙v忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingavaz|lilingavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙v忙z|liling忙v忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongavaz|kongavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙v忙z|kong忙v忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongavaz|kokongavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙v忙z|kokong忙v忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengavaz|kengavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙v忙z|keng忙v忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengavaz|kekengavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙v忙z|kekeng忙v忙z]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
